options.name: Primary Colour
options.default: #8f63ff
options.description: Main glow colour used across buttons and highlights.

options.name: Accent Colour
options.default: #5ce1ff
options.description: Secondary accent used for chips, badges, and highlights.

options.name: Text Highlight Colour
options.default: #ffffff
options.description: Bright text colour for important headings.

options.name: Panel Base Colour
options.description: Base background shade for cards and glass panels.

options.name: Custom Logo
options.description: Upload your own logo if you want to replace the included space logo.

options.name: Custom Favicon
options.description: Upload your own favicon if desired.

options.name: Meta Description
options.default: Cosmo Craft SMP is a space-themed Minecraft community store powered by Tebex.
options.description: Short description used for browser tabs and link previews.

options.name: Home Title
options.default: Launch into the Cosmo Craft universe.
options.description: Large heading shown on the home page.

options.name: Home Intro
options.default: Support the SMP, unlock ranks, stack cosmic rewards, and keep the whole community exploring further.
options.description: Main introduction on the home page.

options.name: Server IP
options.default: play.cosmocraft.net
options.description: Shown in the copy IP button in the header and home page.

options.name: Discord Invite URL
options.default: https://discord.gg/yourinvite
options.description: Used in the header and Rules page invite buttons.

options.name: Footer Note
options.default: Built for explorers, raiders, traders, and every cosmic survivor in Cosmo Craft.
options.description: Custom footer sentence.

options.name: Announcement One
options.default: Season reset soon. Secure your rank before new cosmic quests arrive.
options.description: First announcement card on the home page.

options.name: Announcement Two
options.default: Vote streak rewards are active. Claim up to 6 keys every day.
options.description: Second announcement card on the home page.

options.name: Announcement Three
options.default: Custom item requests are handled through Discord tickets only.
options.description: Third announcement card on the home page.

options.name: Community Post One
options.default: Faction wars are heating up. Build smart, travel faster, and defend your claims.
options.description: First community post card on the home page.

options.name: Community Post Two
options.default: New players are joining daily. Share the IP, invite friends, and grow the universe.
options.description: Second community post card on the home page.

options.name: Community Post Three
options.default: Staff applications and support requests happen directly in Discord.
options.description: Third community post card on the home page.

options.name: Ranks Category Slug
options.default: ranks
options.description: Slug for the Tebex category containing rank packages.

options.name: Money Category Slug
options.default: cosmo-money
options.description: Slug for the Tebex category containing money packages.

options.name: Custom Category Slug
options.default: custom
options.description: Slug for the Tebex category or page containing custom orders.

options.name: Custom Ticket URL
options.default: https://discord.gg/yourinvite
options.description: Discord link used for opening custom purchase tickets.

options.name: Custom Warning Text
options.default: Warning: opening a custom order ticket and wasting staff time without buying may lead to a ban.
options.description: Warning shown on the Store page custom section.

options.name: Vote Link One
options.description: First vote website URL.

options.name: Vote Link Two
options.description: Second vote website URL.

options.name: Vote Link Three
options.description: Third vote website URL.

options.name: Vote Link Four
options.description: Fourth vote website URL.
